allow: Bash(git -C "e:/docs/日本語/開発者" log --oneline --since="2026-04-21" origin/master)
Bash(git -C "e:/docs/日本語/開発者" fetch origin)
Bash(git -C "e:/docs/日本語/開発者" log --oneline -10 origin/master)
additionalDirectories: e:\docs\日本語\開発者\ニュース

hooks.command: cd "e:/docs/日本語/開発者" && git add . && (git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "毎日練習 $(date '+%Y-%m-%d')" && git push)) 2>/dev/null || true
